name: coTfsDeactivateHeartbeatMonitor
title: coTfsDeactivateHeartbeatMonitor
description: This function switches off the calling of the heartbeat callbacks if these are switched on.
The callbacks can be switched on with coTfsActivateHeartbeatMonitor.

parameters.name: nodeId
parameters.description: Identifier of the node for which the heartbeat callbacks are to deactivate.
